text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I see Mejiro Dober buying essential oils
in bulk at the mall.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Lavender helps with falling asleep... Cypress helps
with relaxation...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Eucalyptus aids with concentration... And rose
and lemongrass...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should just get one of everything. It's
starting to look like I need them all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober seems extremely tired. Maybe it's
best to ease off of racing for now.
